text:
**Solana is not supported by Relay**. All the chains I see in the API response have `"vmType":"evm"` - they're all EVM chains. Relay doesn't currently support Solana (SVM) chains.

You can only swap between EVM chains like:
- Ethereum ↔ Base
- Ethereum ↔ Optimism  
- Ethereum ↔ Arbitrum
- Base ↔ Polygon
- etc.

The error "Input and output currencies don't match" is Relay's way of saying it doesn't recognize one of the chains/tokens you selected. If you selected Solana, that's why it's failing - **Solana is not in Relay's supported chains list**.

Try swapping ETH from Ethereum to Base instead - that should work fine!
